name: Dameo
author: AGP port (Dameo, Christian Freeling 2000)
description: Dameo (Christian Freeling, 2000): a modern 8x8 draughts variant played on ALL squares. Each side starts with 18 men in a trapezoidal formation. Men step one square forward (straight or diagonal); the signature LINEAR MOVE shifts a connected line of your own men one square forward along its axis. Men capture orthogonally (forward/back/sideways), captures are mandatory, maximal and chained with end-of-turn removal. A man reaching the far rank becomes a flying king (queen-move, rook-capture). Leave the opponent with no legal move to win.
